title: Miniature Flynn Motor
description: This is a mini flynn motor i made from bits laying about. The magnets are 2cm by .5cm rod neos that cost about 50p each - which is good considering the larger magnets are so expensive. The idea here is to construct something cheaply that can still be used to experiment with. I attached a coil to one arm of the flynn as i have this idea that if we are varying the flux here shouldn't it act to drive the coil and if so what kind of power can we get out of it as opposed to the power we are putting in
